title: sorbus aria var. meridionalis
intro: Sorbus aria var. meridionalis, also known as the Southern Whitebeam, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Sorbus aria var. meridionalis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
